input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.8.2
            TITLE: if a tube frame ( f.6, f.11.2 ) meets the monocoque at the attachments, the connection must

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.8.2: If a tube frame ( F.6, F.11.2 ) meets the monocoque at the Attachments, the connection must
F.7.8.2 If a tube frame ( F.6, F.11.2 ) meets the monocoque at the Attachments, the connection must 
obey one of the two: 
a. Parallel brackets attached to the two sides of the Main Hoop and the two sides of the 
Side Impact Structure 
b. Two mostly perpendicular brackets attached to the Main Hoop and the side and back of 
the monocoque

final_answer: rule F.7.8.2: If a tube frame ( F.6, F.11.2 ) meets the monocoque at the Attachments, the connection must obey one of the two: a. Parallel brackets attached to the two sides of the Main Hoop and the two sides of the Side Impact Structure b. Two mostly perpendicular brackets attached to the Main Hoop and the side and back of the monocoque
